title.zh: CloudFlare WAF 部署实践 - 域名前置与流量检测
title.en: CloudFlare WAF Deployment Practice - Domain Fronting and Traffic Inspection

description.zh: 使用 CloudFlare 云 WAF 保护静态站点，配置自定义规则拦截恶意流量。
description.en: Use CloudFlare cloud WAF to protect static sites with custom rules to block malicious traffic.

content.zh:
CloudFlare WAF 所需条件：
- 拥有域名
- 域名对应解析 IP 开放 Web Server
- CloudFlare 账号（注册即可）
content.en:
CloudFlare WAF requirements:
- Own a domain
- Domain DNS IP runs Web Server
- CloudFlare account (free registration)

annotation.zh: 免费方案适合个人站点防护
annotation.en: Free plan suitable for personal site protection

content.zh:
部署步骤：
1. 阿里云域名面板设置解析 IP
2. 修改 DNS Server 为 CloudFlare：diva.ns.cloudflare.com / nitin.ns.cloudflare.com
3. 进入 CloudFlare 添加站点，上传认证文件到 Web root
4. 配置 WAF 规则
content.en:
Deployment steps:
1. Set DNS IP in domain panel
2. Change DNS Server to CloudFlare: diva.ns.cloudflare.com / nitin.ns.cloudflare.com
3. Add site in CloudFlare, upload auth file to web root
4. Configure WAF rules

annotation.zh: DNS 生效需要等待一段时间

codeBlocks.code:
$ yum install -y readline-devel pcre pcre-devel openssl openssl-devel gcc curl GeoIP-devel wget perl
$ wget https://openresty.org/download/openresty-1.15.8.3.tar.gz 
$ tar -xvf openresty-1.15.8.3.tar.gz 
$ cd openresty-1.15.8.3 
$ ./configure -j2 
$ make -j2 
$ sudo make install

$ vi HelloWorld.lua
print("Hello World!")
$ lua HelloWorld.lua
Hello World!

content.zh:
自定义 WAF 规则：
- 静态站点禁用 POST：(http.request.method eq "POST")
- 文件读取防护：(http.request.uri.path contains "etc/passwd")
- 目录遍历防护：(http.request.uri.path contains ".") or (contains "%2e")
content.en:
Custom WAF rules:
- Disable POST for static sites: (http.request.method eq "POST")
- File read protection: (http.request.uri.path contains "etc/passwd")
- Directory traversal: (http.request.uri.path contains ".") or (contains "%2e")

annotation.zh: 规则作用于根域名及其所有子域名
annotation.en: Rules apply to root domain and all subdomains

content.zh:
规则生效测试：
curl https://domain.com/etc/passwd -I
HTTP/2 403
返回 403 表示 WAF 规则生效
content.en:
Rule activation test:
curl https://domain.com/etc/passwd -I
HTTP/2 403
403 response indicates WAF rule is active

annotation.zh: CloudFlare 返回 403 表示请求被拦截
annotation.en: CloudFlare returns 403 when request is blocked

content.zh:
本地 WAF 方案（JXWAF）：
1. 安装 OpenResty：./configure && make && make install
2. 配置 nginx.conf 加载 Lua 脚本
3. 接入 JXWAF 规则库
4. 实现自定义拦截规则
content.en:
Local WAF solution (JXWAF):
1. Install OpenResty: ./configure && make && make install
2. Configure nginx.conf to load Lua scripts
3. Connect to JXWAF rule set
4. Implement custom blocking rules

annotation.zh: OpenResty 基于 Nginx + Lua，高性能 WAF 方案
annotation.en: OpenResty is Nginx + Lua based, high-performance WAF solution

content.zh:
WAF 部署总结：
- CloudFlare 适合快速部署，免费方案功能有限
- 自建 WAF（JXWAF）灵活性更高
- 规则需根据实际攻击场景持续优化
- 注意避免误报影响正常业务
content.en:
WAF deployment summary:
- CloudFlare for quick deployment, free plan has limitations
- Self-hosted WAF (JXWAF) offers more flexibility
- Rules need continuous optimization based on attack scenarios
- Avoid false positives affecting normal business

annotation.zh: WAF 是纵深防御的一环，不是唯一防线
annotation.en: WAF is one layer of defense in depth, not the only line
